---
title: "Elizabeth Carter"
---

## Elizabeth Carter

**Dates:** (1717-1806)

### Description

scholar and translator

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from Decr 12th 1860
- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
